---
title: 'Potamoi: Accelerating Neural Rendering via a Unified Streaming Architecture'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Weikai Lin
- Zihan Liu
- Jingwen Leng
- Minyi Guo
- Han Zhao
- Xiaofeng Hou
- Jieru Zhao
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3689340
journ: TACO
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
note: Supersedes ISCA 2024 Cicero paper
pub_number: 82
---
